item.title: 🗣️ Our data indicates crypto social media views these as the top trending topics Tuesday. Keep tabs on our Trending Stories Dashboard here: https://app.santiment.net/social-trends/trending-stories?utm

item.title:
OGN On-Chain Divergence: Aggressive Binance Inflows Meet Network Dormancy
“Net inflows to the exchange have surged over 1,030% versus the three-month baseline, capped by a single-day spike of +8.2M t
item.description:
OGN On-Chain Divergence: Aggressive Binance Inflows Meet Network Dormancy
“Net inflows to the exchange have surged over 1,030% versus the three-month baseline, capped by a single-day spike of +8.2M tokens on June 15th.” – By @CryptoOnchain

item.title: R to @MorenoDV_: Read more ⤵️ http://cryptoquant.com/insights/quicktake/6a31a33b9139404af2b01c77-Nearly-Half-of-All-Stablecoins-Are-Waiting-on-Exchanges-Bitcoin-Is-Feeling-Every?utm_source=twitter&utm
item.description: Read more ⤵️ cryptoquant.com/insights/qui…

item.title:
Nearly Half of All Stablecoins Are Waiting on Exchanges
“Liquidity remains abundant, but highly selective. As a result, modest changes in investor conviction, risk appetite, or capital deployment con
item.description:
Nearly Half of All Stablecoins Are Waiting on Exchanges
“Liquidity remains abundant, but highly selective. As a result, modest changes in investor conviction, risk appetite, or capital deployment continue to generate disproportionate volatility across Bitcoin.” – By @MorenoDV_

item.title:
STH SOPR Has Not Entered Panic Territory Yet
“Fragile recovery phase rather than full capitulation; a reclaim of 1.0 would confirm improving short-term sentiment, while a renewed drop below 0.95 woul
item.description:
STH SOPR Has Not Entered Panic Territory Yet
“Fragile recovery phase rather than full capitulation; a reclaim of 1.0 would confirm improving short-term sentiment, while a renewed drop below 0.95 would signal rising panic risk” – By COINDREAM
Link ⤵️ cryptoquant.com/insights/qui…

item.title: R to @IT_Tech_PL: Complete breakdown ⤵️ https://cryptoquant.com/insights/quicktake/6a319b71178f3b625a4b4d9a-Altcoin-sell-pressure-just-hit-a-5-year-extreme?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=sns&utm_campai
item.description: Complete breakdown ⤵️ cryptoquant.com/insights/qui…

item.title:
Altcoin Sell Pressure Hits a 5-Year Extreme
“This is not a dip. It’s 15 months of continuous net selling on Spot Exchanges. Cumulative buy/sell volume diff (alts excluded BTC/ETH): deepest negative r
item.description:
Altcoin Sell Pressure Hits a 5-Year Extreme
“This is not a dip. It’s 15 months of continuous net selling on Spot Exchanges. Cumulative buy/sell volume diff (alts excluded BTC/ETH): deepest negative reading since data began in 2020.” – By @IT_Tech_PL

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: This is the bigger shift:
Less “open chart → check metric → copy signal.”
More “call endpoint → pipe into workflow → act faster.”
Get your API keys and start building ⤵️ http
item.description:
This is the bigger shift:
Less “open chart → check metric → copy signal.”
More “call endpoint → pipe into workflow → act faster.”
Get your API keys and start building ⤵️ alpha.cryptoquant.com/indica…

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: Bull-Bear Market Indicator
A cycle momentum signal based on the gap between the PnL Index and its 365-day moving average.
Helpful for tracking whether the market is leaning bu
item.description:
Bull-Bear Market Indicator
A cycle momentum signal based on the gap between the PnL Index and its 365-day moving average.
Helpful for tracking whether the market is leaning bull, bear, early bull, or overheating.
Endpoint:
GET /v2/community/bitcoin-bull-bear-indicator

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: Trader Realized Price
Shows the realized price of Bitcoin held for 1–3 months, with max, upper, lower, and min price bands.
Useful for tracking where recent buyers may be sitt
item.description:
Trader Realized Price
Shows the realized price of Bitcoin held for 1–3 months, with max, upper, lower, and min price bands.
Useful for tracking where recent buyers may be sitting in profit or stress.
Endpoint:
GET /v2/community/bitcoin-trader-realized-price

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: Apparent Demand
Tracks Bitcoin spot demand changes over 30 days and one year.
Useful for spotting when demand is expanding, cooling, or flipping direction.
Endpoint:
GET /v2
item.description:
Apparent Demand
Tracks Bitcoin spot demand changes over 30 days and one year.
Useful for spotting when demand is expanding, cooling, or flipping direction.
Endpoint:
GET /v2/community/bitcoin-apparent-demand

item.title:
New on the CryptoQuant API 👀
10 Bitcoin signals built as queries are now API endpoints.
The metrics you’ve been reading on charts can now be pulled in one call, straight into bots, alerts, dashboard
item.description:
New on the CryptoQuant API 👀
10 Bitcoin signals built as queries are now API endpoints.
The metrics you’ve been reading on charts can now be pulled in one call, straight into bots, alerts, dashboards, and models.
Here are three we’d watch closely 👇

item.title:
Pre-IPO perpetual volume has exploded from $2M in March to $12B as of June.
Binance alone now controls ~83% of the market.
item.description:
Pre-IPO perpetual volume has exploded from $2M in March to $12B as of June.
Binance alone now controls ~83% of the market.

item.title:
XRP Leverage Ratio on Binance Hits Highest Level Since Early 2026
“Leverage reaching its highest level since the beginning of 2026 could indicate growing trader confidence in the continuation of the
item.description:
XRP Leverage Ratio on Binance Hits Highest Level Since Early 2026
“Leverage reaching its highest level since the beginning of 2026 could indicate growing trader confidence in the continuation of the short-term upward trend.” – By @ArabxChain

item.title: R to @Darkfost_Coc: Read more ⤵️ https://cryptoquant.com/insights/quicktake/6a3060e59139404af2b01a16-Binance-Futures-trading-reaches-800T-Fueled-by-recent-speculation?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=sns
item.description: Read more ⤵️ cryptoquant.com/insights/qui…

item.title:
Binance Futures Trading Reaches $800T, Fueled by Speculation
“Recent surge in trading activity likely contributed to the formation of a local bottom. However, caution remains, as a market structure d
item.description:
Binance Futures Trading Reaches $800T, Fueled by Speculation
“Recent surge in trading activity likely contributed to the formation of a local bottom. However, caution remains, as a market structure driven primarily by leverage is generally less resilient.” – By @Darkfost_Coc

item.title:
The Kelp DAO escrow held about 49 rsETH when the bridge message came through claiming 116,500. Every downstream check passed anyway.
On Wednesday our research team walks through why, and what a reco
item.description:
The Kelp DAO escrow held about 49 rsETH when the bridge message came through claiming 116,500. Every downstream check passed anyway.
On Wednesday our research team walks through why, and what a reconciliation check at the policy layer looks like in practice: buff.ly/FC1PsUg

item.title:
The near-term opportunity in onchain finance is not exotic. It is stablecoins sitting in corporate treasuries with nowhere safe to go.
Dan Caspi, CTO at Hypernative, mapped the trajectory at Consensu
item.description:
The near-term opportunity in onchain finance is not exotic. It is stablecoins sitting in corporate treasuries with nowhere safe to go.
Dan Caspi, CTO at Hypernative, mapped the trajectory at Consensus Miami: companies are getting paid in crypto, holding stablecoins, and discovering that moving them

item.title:
The source chain held about 49 rsETH. The bridge message claimed 116,500. Every downstream check passed.
Our research team walks through the whys of Kelp DAO attack on June 17, and what reconciliati
item.description:
The source chain held about 49 rsETH. The bridge message claimed 116,500. Every downstream check passed.
Our research team walks through the whys of Kelp DAO attack on June 17, and what reconciliation at the policy layer looks like: buff.ly/FC1PsUg

item.title:
RT by @l2beat: Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: -
item.description:
Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: - New Interoperability page and the entire infrastructure around it - Token registry covering 3,000+ token deploymen

item.title:
Public goods are the backbone of this ecosystem, and initiatives like @OctantApp prove it.
We’re thrilled for Epoch 12 and so thankful to participate in this new round!
Octant is for everyone! ❤️
item.description:
Public goods are the backbone of this ecosystem, and initiatives like @OctantApp prove it.
We’re thrilled for Epoch 12 and so thankful to participate in this new round!
Octant is for everyone! ❤️
Octant (@OctantApp)
We're excited to share Epoch 12: Octant is for everyone.
Allocation window op

item.title:

Tomorrow is Protocol Day at @JoinFutura and our researcher @donnoh_eth is doing double duty: first hosting a panel, then dropping a technical talk.
item.description:

item.title:
R to @l2beat: This isn’t a generic feed. Every single L2 project page on L2BEAT has its own dedicated Updates tab.
So feel free to check and explore the updates of your favorites L2s.
https://l2bea
item.description:
This isn’t a generic feed. Every single L2 project page on L2BEAT has its own dedicated Updates tab.
So feel free to check and explore the updates of your favorites L2s.
